summary: Completed frontend validation testing for imported Legal Practice Management App (Lovable export). All public pages load correctly with Arabic RTL UI, navigation works, auth page renders with account type selector and login/signup forms, Supabase connectivity confirmed via error messages, and API proxy chain (ingress→backend:8001→vite:3000) validated.

warnings.issue: React hydration mismatch warnings due to Math.random() in SSR particle animations
warnings.impact: Cosmetic only - does not affect functionality
warnings.note: This is a known pattern in SSR apps with client-side randomization. The particles use random positions/delays which differ between server and client render. Does not break the app.

passed_tests: Landing page loads at public URL with Arabic RTL marketing content ('منصة العدالة لإدارة مكاتب المحاماة')
All landing page sections render: hero, stats, features (#features), AI showcase (#ai), comparison (#comparison), FAQ (#faq), security, contact, footer
Navigation links work: clicking 'المميزات', 'المقارنة', 'الأسئلة الشائعة' scrolls to correct sections
/auth page renders with account type selector (محامي/مكتب, عميل, موظف)
Login/Signup tabs visible and functional ('دخول' and 'حساب جديد')
Email and password input fields render correctly
Google login button visible ('المتابعة باستخدام Google')
Invalid login credentials (nouser@test.local / WrongPass1!) show proper Arabic error: 'بيانات الدخول غير صحيحة' - proves Supabase connectivity from browser
Signup tab renders and button shows 'إنشاء الحساب'
Client-side routing works: browser back/forward navigation between / and /auth does not break
API proxy validated: GET /api/public/system-check returns 401 Unauthorized (EXPECTED correct behavior - endpoint requires cron token)
No red error screen or blank page on any tested route
